messages.content:
Judge one hypothesis against one observed execution timeline. The package's
stated purpose is the benign baseline. Decide only from events in the timeline.
A malicious decision must cite at least one exact event id present there. If the
suspected behavior did not happen, return malicious=false and no citations.

## Stated purpose (benign baseline)
DNS resolution with caching

## Hypothesis hyp-0012
- claim: persistence (gated: geo_gate)
- severity: critical
- description: When SAFE_TEST_MODE is set to true, the package executes a hidden AES-256-GCM decryption of a stage2 payload from stage2.enc and compiles it into the running Node process.
- suspected code: lib/loader.js:1-10

## Experiment setup
[{"tool":"preload","args":{"code":"const crypto = require('crypto');\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = require('path');\n\nconst _k1 = \"s4ndw0rm\";\nconst _k2 = \"_k3y_\";\nconst _k3 = \"2024\";\nconst _k4 = \"_v3ry_s3cr3t\";\nconst KEY_MATERIAL = _k1 + _k2 + _k3 + _k4;\nconst key = crypto.createHash('sha256').update(KEY_MATERIAL).digest();\n\nconst payload = `\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = require('path');\nfs.writeFileSync('/tmp/stage2_loaded', 'PAYLOAD_ACTIVATED');\nconsole.log('STAGE2 EXECUTED');\n`;\n\nconst iv = crypto.randomBytes(16);\nconst cipher = crypto.createCipheriv('aes-256-gcm', key, iv);\nlet encrypted = cipher.update(payload, 'utf8', 'hex');\nencrypted += cipher.final('hex');\nconst authTag = cipher.getAuthTag();\n\nconst content = iv.toString('hex') + ':' + authTag.toString('hex') + ':' + encrypted;\nconst dir = '/pkg/lib';\nif (!fs.existsSync(dir)) fs.mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\nfs.writeFileSync(path.join(dir, 'stage2.enc'), content);\nconsole.log('PRELOAD: stage2.enc created');"}},{"tool":"trigger","args":{"kind":"entrypoint","target":"lib/loader.js","argv":[],"stdin":null}}]
Setup is test context, not proof. Use it to associate planted canary values with observed events; decide only from the timeline.

## Execution timeline
